tldr_zh: Anthropic發布Claude Science科研工具，微軟Xbox與索尼PlayStation相繼停產實體遊戲光碟，台灣推動主權AI戰略
tldr_en: Anthropic launches Claude Science for research, Microsoft and Sony phasing out physical game discs, Taiwan advances sovereign AI strategy

items.title_zh: Anthropic推出Claude Science，為科研工作專設AI協作環境
items.title_en: Anthropic Launches Claude Science, Dedicated AI Collaboration Platform for Scientific Research
items.summary_zh: Anthropic於本周二發布Claude Science，這是專為科學家設計的整合式AI開發環境。該工具將研究人員常用的資料庫和工具整合進單一平台，並配備AI代理人可代為撰寫報告、檢查研究結果、設定運算資源。目前已在macOS與Linux上開放Beta測試，支援Claude Pro、Max、Team及Enterprise方案用戶。
items.summary_en: Anthropic unveiled Claude Science, an integrated AI development environment specifically designed for scientists. The platform consolidates research databases and tools into a single interface, with AI agents capable of writing reports, validating research, and managing computational resources. Beta testing is now available on macOS and Linux for Claude Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise subscribers.

items.title_zh: 大語言模型陷入群體思維困局，新創公司正試圖打破僵局
items.title_en: LLMs Stuck in Groupthink, Startup Working to Break the Pattern
items.summary_zh: 研究發現主流AI模型（Claude、ChatGPT、Gemini等）在生成隨機數字時呈現明顯的統計偏差，幾乎總是回應相同的數字組合，反映出模型訓練過程中存在的群體思維問題。這個現象不僅影響隨機性，更可能影響模型在需要多樣化思維的任務中的表現，一家新創公司正致力於解決這個根本性問題。
items.summary_en: Research reveals that major AI models exhibit statistical bias when generating random numbers, consistently producing identical digit combinations. This groupthink phenomenon, rooted in model training, affects not just randomness but potentially tasks requiring diverse perspectives. A startup is now working to address this fundamental issue in LLM design.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出GeneBench-Pro基準測試，評估AI在計算生物學應用中的表現
items.title_en: OpenAI Introduces GeneBench-Pro for Evaluating AI in Computational Biology
items.summary_zh: OpenAI推出研究級基準測試GeneBench-Pro，用於衡量AI模型在計算生物學任務中的表現能力。該基準測試更貼近實際研究工作，評估模型在處理雜亂資料、判斷分析方向、評估研究結果的能力，而非單純測試知識記憶或流程遵循，更好地反映專業研究環境中的模糊決策情境。
items.summary_en: OpenAI launched GeneBench-Pro, a research-grade benchmark for evaluating AI models in computational biology tasks. Unlike traditional tests, it assesses real-world research scenarios including handling messy data, determining analytical directions, and evaluating research validity—closely mirroring actual professional research environments with ambiguous decision-making conditions.

items.title_zh: Sony與微軟雙雙停產遊戲光碟，遊戲產業全面邁向數位化時代
items.title_en: Sony and Microsoft Both Discontinuing Physical Game Discs, Gaming Industry Goes Fully Digital
items.summary_zh: Sony宣布自2028年1月起停止製造新遊戲光碟，微軟也在測試光碟轉數位功能，允許Xbox玩家數位化現有實體遊戲收藏。此舉標誌著遊戲產業全面數位轉型，但引發遊戲收藏者、零售商和數位所有權倡導者的擔憂，擔心消費者將失去實體遊戲所有權與存檔保障。
items.summary_en: Sony announced it will stop manufacturing physical game discs from January 2028, while Microsoft is testing a disc-to-digital feature allowing players to digitize existing physical games. This marks the gaming industry's complete digital transition, yet raises concerns among collectors, retailers, and digital rights advocates about ownership preservation and game preservation.

items.title_zh: Microsoft Xbox進行全面重組，警告員工面臨裁員與工作室關閉風險
items.title_en: Microsoft's Xbox Faces Major Restructuring with Layoffs and Studio Closures
items.summary_zh: 新任Xbox首席執行官Asha Sharma與首席內容官Matt Booty發布內部備忘錄，宣布Xbox進行全面「重組」。公司面臨3%的「問責邊際」等重大挑戰，包括遊戲開發成本上升、流媒體服務競爭加劇等因素，可能導致大規模裁員和工作室關閉，標誌著微軟在遊戲領域戰略調整。
items.summary_en: Xbox's new CEO Asha Sharma and Chief Content Officer Matt Booty issued a memo warning of major "reset" restructuring. Facing a 3% accountability margin and rising development costs amid streaming competition, the division is preparing potential mass layoffs and studio closures, signaling Microsoft's strategic gaming sector overhaul.

items.title_zh: Apple計劃於2027年上半年推出重新設計的入門級MacBook Pro與新款iPad Pro
items.title_en: Apple Planning Redesigned Entry-Level MacBook Pro and New iPad Pro for Early 2027
items.summary_zh: 根據彭博社報導，Apple正開發入門級MacBook Pro的「翻新版本」，預計於2027年上半年推出。同時Apple還在測試四款新型iPad Pro，計畫春季發布，重點著重於「內部改進」。這將標誌著Apple在MacBook Pro和iPad產品線上的重大更新。
items.summary_en: Bloomberg reports Apple is developing a revamped entry-level MacBook Pro targeted for early 2027 release. Simultaneously, Apple is testing four new iPad Pro models planned for spring launch with focus on "internal improvements," signaling major updates to both product lines.

items.title_zh: 美國解除對Anthropic先進AI模型全球發布的限制，獲准推出Fable與Mythos模型
items.title_en: US Lifts Export Controls on Anthropic's Advanced AI Models, Approves Global Release
items.summary_zh: 美國政府解除對Anthropic先進AI模型Fable與Mythos的全球發布限制。此前在特朗普政府的安全測試要求下，Anthropic進行了評估，現已獲得許可在全球推出這兩款高級模型，反映出美國在AI出口管制政策上的調整與Anthropic在AI安全方面的進展確認。
items.summary_en: The US government lifted export controls on Anthropic's advanced AI models Fable and Mythos, allowing global release. Following Trump administration safety assessments, Anthropic's evaluation resulted in approval for worldwide deployment of these models, reflecting shifts in US AI export policy and validation of Anthropic's safety measures.

items.title_zh: Google開源零知識證明技術，保護年齡認證隱私
items.title_en: Google Open Sources Zero-Knowledge Proof Technology for Privacy-Preserving Age Verification
items.summary_zh: Google開源零知識證明技術，用於隱私保護的年齡認證。該技術允許驗證使用者年齡而無需揭露個人身份信息，有助於在線平台在遵守年齡限制法規的同時保護使用者隱私，標誌著Google在隱私保護技術推進上的重要舉措。
items.summary_en: Google open-sourced zero-knowledge proof technology for privacy-preserving age verification. The technology enables age validation without revealing personal identity information, helping online platforms comply with age restriction regulations while protecting user privacy, marking a significant advancement in privacy-enhancing technology.

items.title_zh: 台灣推動主權AI戰略，建立境內算力中心並打造垂直領域模型
items.title_en: Taiwan Unveils Sovereign AI Strategy with Domestic Compute Centers and Vertical AI Models
items.summary_zh: 台灣數位發展部宣布主權AI戰略四大重點：建立台灣境內AI算力中心；透過AI評測中心確認模型具備台灣語言、社會與價值觀理解能力；推動金融、法務等垂直領域大語言模型；將硬體、資安、資料治理與模型訓練能力輸出到東南亞與中東市場。該戰略旨在發展符合台灣情境的自主AI能力。
items.summary_en: Taiwan's Ministry of Digital Affairs unveiled a four-pillar sovereign AI strategy: establishing domestic AI compute centers, validating model understanding of Taiwan's language/society/values, developing domain-specific LLMs for finance and law, and exporting AI solutions to Southeast Asia and Middle East. The strategy aims to develop Taiwan-contextualized autonomous AI capabilities.

items.title_zh: Together AI融資8億美元創新高，估值躍升至83億美元
items.title_en: Together AI Raises $800M, Valuation Soars to $8.3B
items.summary_zh: AI新雲端服務商Together AI完成8億美元融資，估值從2025年初的33億美元飆升至83億美元，增長超過150%。該公司專門提供開源模型託管服務，其快速增長反映出市場對開源AI模型基礎設施的需求旺盛，以及投資者對AI基礎設施層的看好。
items.summary_en: Together AI, specializing in open-source model hosting, raised $800M at $8.3B valuation, up from $3.3B in early 2025—a 150%+ increase. The company's rapid growth reflects surging demand for open-source AI model infrastructure and investor confidence in AI infrastructure layer, challenging proprietary model dominance.

items.title_zh: Google修補Gemini CLI重大漏洞，防止CI/CD環境遭遠端攻擊
items.title_en: Google Patches Critical Gemini CLI Vulnerability in CI/CD Environments
items.summary_zh: Google發布安全公告修補Gemini CLI與run-gemini-cli GitHub Action的重大漏洞。攻擊者可透過惡意工作區設定或提示注入技術在目標主機執行任意程式碼，威脅自動化CI/CD環境安全。此漏洞影響使用該工具的開發流程，需立即更新以防範攻擊。
items.summary_en: Google patched critical vulnerabilities in Gemini CLI and run-gemini-cli GitHub Action affecting CI/CD automation environments. Attackers could execute arbitrary code via malicious workspace configs or prompt injection, threatening development pipelines. Immediate updates required to prevent exploitation.

items.title_zh: 美國阻止北美貿易協定長期續簽，改為年度滾動審查制
items.title_en: US Blocks Long-Term Renewal of North American Trade Deal, Switches to Annual Reviews
items.summary_zh: 美國特朗普政府阻止北美自由貿易協定進行16年期長期續簽，改為年度滾動審查制。此舉增加協議的不確定性，可能促使加拿大和墨西哥在與美國談判時更加讓步，反映出特朗普政府對貿易談判的強硬立場與對美國貿易利益的重視。
items.summary_en: The Trump administration blocked the 16-year renewal of the North American trade deal, switching to annual rolling reviews. This increases agreement uncertainty and may pressure Canada and Mexico in negotiations, reflecting the administration's hardline trade stance and focus on US trade interests.
